title: Simple Enchantments
description: Unique enchanted book textures, in a vanilla-like way.
body:
![The resourcepack banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26e91a303273d23b8a1fc1628017c0fe43322a45.gif)
## Simple Enchantments is a pack that gives all enchanted books a unique texture, in a vanilla-like style
The textures match either where the enchantment is obtained, or its function.
There are a couple animated ones as well.

## Supported versions:
- **1.13+** with Optifine or Cit Resewn
- **1.21.5+** on vanilla Minecraft

![All enchantments](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/998444ec7b642ae65680cac888c9b033c55e4ffb.png)

I publish all of my resourcepacks for **free**, and ad revenue is usually around 3$ per month from all of them combined, so any donations are very appreciated.

[![A pixelart of the word "donate"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92ff631c976bd58fbb443ae89158499badb2a6b7.png)](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=B75MGYUT2UCDC)

### If you want to report a bug or have a suggestion, you can message me on discord @aspoleczne

Big thanks to ImpSteve for providing a template for custom enchanted books on the newest vanilla versions, and saving me alot of time on not having to write the code myself.
His [Github](https://github.com/ImpSteve) and His [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/ImpSteve)
